compiled_state.title: Update SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md to explicitly prohibit CLI_user tag on autonomous bug tickets
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Implementation

In `plugins/dso/docs/SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md`:

1. In the "Sub-agents must NOT" section, add:
   "Use --tags CLI_user when creating bug tickets for discovered defects or anti-pattern occurrences. The CLI_user tag is reserved for bugs that a human explicitly asked the agent to file during interactive conversation."

2. In the "Permitted Actions" section, update the existing bug ticket creation line:
   Current: `.claude/scripts/dso ticket create bug "..." --parent <parent-id>` for discovered bugs
   Updated: `.claude/scripts/dso ticket create bug "..." --parent <parent-id>` for discovered bugs (do NOT add --tags CLI_user — these are autonomous discoveries, not user-requested bugs)

## TDD Requirement

RED test task bafd-04bd must be completed first. After this implementation, test `test-sub-agent-boundaries-cli-user-tag.sh` must PASS (GREEN).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md "Sub-agents must NOT" section contains CLI_user prohibition
  Verify: grep -q "CLI_user" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md
- [ ] test-sub-agent-boundaries-cli-user-tag.sh now passes GREEN
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/scripts/test-sub-agent-boundaries-cli-user-tag.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6 ✓ — SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md updated with CLI_user prohibition. Test GREEN.
comments.author: Test
